purpose: To showcase HubSpot's Commerce Hub software, detailing its features for CPQ, billing, and payments, and to encourage users to request a demo or start a free trial.
importantSections: Hero Section: CPQ, Billing, and Payments Software
AI That Helps You Close Deals Faster
Unlock Visibility With Automation and Reporting
summary: This page introduces HubSpot Commerce Hub, an AI-powered software designed to accelerate the quote-to-revenue process by integrating CPQ, billing, and payment functionalities. It highlights features for faster deal closing, streamlined financial operations, and improved reporting visibility. The page provides pricing details for different editions and answers common questions to drive user engagement and conversion.
